ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPMailer/PHPMailer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPMailer/PHPMailer
Language: php
The classic email sending library for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: akaunting/akaunting
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/akaunting/akaunting
Language: php
Online Accounting Software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ellite/Wallos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ellite/Wallos
Language: php
Wallos: Open-source, self-hostable personal subscription tracker. Visualize your recurring expenses, manage your budget, and save money.

URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament

URL: https://github.com/librespeed/speedtest
Language: php
Self-hosted Speed Test for HTML5 and more. Easy setup, examples, configurable, mobile friendly. Supports PHP, Node, Multiple servers, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lunarphp/lunar

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: passbolt/passbolt_api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/passbolt/passbolt_api
Language: php
Passbolt Community Edition (CE) API. The JSON API for the open source password manager for teams!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.
